headline: UiTM Expansion Plan Adds 15,000 Seats Amid Quality Debate
context: UiTM announced plans to increase enrollment capacity by 15,000 across 5 new satellite campuses by 2028.

cards.big: UiTM plans 5 new campuses adding 15,000 seats for Bumiputera students by 2028
cards.sub: Total enrollment would reach 185,000 making it Southeast Asia's largest university

cards.big: UiTM graduate employment rate of 68% trails the national university average of 74%
cards.sub: Expansion without quality improvement risks producing more underemployed graduates

cards.big: RM2.3 billion allocated for new campus construction over 3-year development period
cards.sub: Per-student investment could instead upgrade existing facilities and teaching quality

cards.big: Article 153 provides for Bumiputera reservations in educational institutions
cards.sub: Constitutional affirmative action operates alongside debates on institutional quality

cards.big: More seats mean nothing if they lead to the same degree without the same opportunity
Should UiTM prioritize quality improvements over enrollment expansion
